text.title: CD Pipelines and Deployment Strategies Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are cd-basics prereqs in place AND is the workload long-running?

text.example: SLO 99.9%, moderate traffic → canary 5/25/50/100 → health gate between steps → auto-rollback on err>2x baseline → DORA emitter → deploy frequency 4×/day.
